items.name: "Dynamic" Price Floor Update - CREATED BY FOOLS
items.description:
Early March 2024, the fast food restaurant "Wendy's" had a leaked "surge pricing" upcoming change. What this basically means, is when the restaurant is busy, the food would be more expensive (lunch and dinner). Upon the intense and harsh backlash they faced on the same day, Wendy's said this was a false leak and they would not be implementing this.

Roblox has had this "surge pricing" implemented for a while now, calling it dynamic price floor, and it will only get worse. YOUR HATS ARE MORE EXPENSIVE BECAUSE ROBLOX IS GREEDY AND DOES NOT CARE ABOUT THEIR CONSUMERS. This update of course also negatively affects UGC creators. More than likely, the price floor will do nothing but increase.

items.name: Eye of the Oceanic Abyss
items.description:
Behold the swirling depths of the Eye of the Oceanic Abyss! Awaken the tempestuous might that lies dormant within, where oceanic currents converge and mysteries unfold. Brace yourself, for its azure glare cuts through the deepest shadows, signaling the rise of the aquatic sentinel. Harness its formidable power cautiously, for once unshackled, its wrath surges relentlessly, unfathomable and unstoppable. 

Texture by Nifloxeo :)

items.name: Frayed Cap
items.description: A one-of-a-kind hat that embodies the essence of 90s fashion. This unique piece holds an exceptional value as it is a never-used prototype, adding to its rarity and appeal. The cap features a striking combination of black and denim, creating a stylish and versatile look. With its frayed edges and distressed detailing, it exudes a sense of effortless coolness and urban flair. This hat captures the spirit of the 90s, a decade known for its grunge, hip-hop, and streetwear influences. It is a coveted item for fashion enthusiasts and collectors seeking to embrace a nostalgic aesthetic.
